content: JetStream backpressure: MaxMsgs on StreamConfig sets maximum messages in stream. DiscardNew policy rejects new messages when MaxMsgs reached (returns error to publisher). Combined: WorkQueuePolicy + MaxMsgs + DiscardNew = bounded work queue that rejects when full. Publisher gets NATS error code 10077 (maximum messages exceeded). HTTP handler translates this to 429/422 with Retry-After header. Stream.Info(ctx).State.Msgs gives current depth for monitoring.
